heroSubtitle: Pyrography — art with fire and soul
featuredIntro: A look at my latest pieces. The link takes you to the full gallery.
aboutText: I'm Alinta — a pyrography artist by passion. I want to share my work and my fascination for wood-burning art with you.
shopIntro: All pieces available for purchase are listed here — each one is unique, but most motifs can happily be commissioned as a new edition.
contactText: For detailed requests and commissions, please use the contact form.
